ab: jiyax sayang dhuq ku empitu patas hidaw sapah pyasan ka yaku.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: Prajing sluhay da, mtmay pyasan ka emptgsa, rmngaw ka qbsuran pyasan, “Hiyug! Thmuku!” msa.
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: Paru bi ka hnang nami rmngaw, “emptgsa embiyax su.”
Smluhay nami siida, tmgsa mnan kari seejiq sppgan ka emptgsa.
ch: 我們上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the seejiq language of numbers.

ab: Sneegul nami emptgsa smpug, meuyas nami uyas sppgan.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: Egu bi ka snlhayan mu kari seejiq.
en: I have learned many seejiq languages.

ab: Musa ku sapah pyasan kdjiyax, smluhay ku kari seejiq kdjiyax, skari ku kari Seejiq qbhangun mu bubu.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要說族語給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the seejiq language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
